Programs

Build the work.

Three ways to train at the house. All coached. All custom-programmed. All built for results you can actually see.

01 · 1-on-1

Personal Training

You and a coach. Custom program, dialed-in form coaching, and real-time progression. The fastest path from where you are to where you want to be.

02 · Small Group

Semi-Private

Train with up to three other people on your own program — same coach, same room, lower per-session cost. The model our regulars love.

03 · App

Programming On Your Phone

The House app delivers your daily workout, demo videos for every lift, and progress tracking — so the program follows you on travel days.

The Floor

Welcome to the house.

Industrial concrete, premium equipment, and a neon sign that says exactly what we mean.

Members

Real results. No filter.

Real Google reviews from real House members.

5 ★★★★★

"This gym has been such a finding for me — amazing trainers and the program that pushes you to become a better self. Huge shout out to Viviana who is super caring, patient and just a wonderful trainer. I'm doing semi-private packages with her and every time I'm so grateful. Highly recommend!"

Mariam Topuria · Google
5 ★★★★★

"House of Transformation has transformed my lifestyle. The coaches give you that extra motivation, hold you accountable and help you accomplish your fitness goals. Professionals guiding you through your exercises, making sure you don't get injured and you're getting the most out of your workout."

Dan Dan · Google
5 ★★★★★

"Viviana is amazing! I've taken the Lower Body Strength class twice now and she is always very attentive and motivates you to do your best. She's also very accommodating if you're new to strength training. I couldn't recommend this gym or this coach more!"

Nicole Pabón · Google
